title: Realistic Rowing
description: Makes rowing more realistic. May or may not improve your boating experience.
body:
Realistic Rowing

You like rowing in real life and felt like Minecraft's boating experience was lacking? Use this mod to get a more similar experience!
Features - You now look backwards, just like in a real-life rowing boat! - This makes for a great experience when boating with animals or in a chest boat/raft! - moves the paddles to actually touch your hands (this is especially noticeable with multiple passengers) - moves the player model to better fit in the boat since it's now turned the other way round
Side-Effects if only a part of players have this mod installed - People using this mod may have turned their head in a weird direction while boating if looking from a client without this mod. This is caused by turning the player model around to look in the other direction but since boats restrict the yaw of the head to ±105° (0° being the direction the boat is facing). Therefore people using this mod will likely look sideways when viewed by other clients without this mod.
